name: @auralogic/js-worker-debugger
description: TypeScript development toolchain for the unified Plugin Debugger js_worker sample.

scripts.build: npm run sdk:ensure && npm run clean && node ./scripts/build.mjs --minify
scripts.test: npm run sdk:ensure && npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/lib/debugger.test.js
scripts.package: npm run validate:manifest && npm run build && node ./scripts/package.mjs
